/usr/bin/c++  -O0 -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/write.dir/home/jiang.2091/s3-hyperslab/exp/20220318-concurrency-level/src/write.cc.o  -o write -Wl,-rpath,/home/jiang.2091/HDF5/build/lib:/usr/local/lib /home/jiang.2091/HDF5/build/lib/libhdf5.so -lz -ldl -lm /usr/local/lib/libaws-cpp-sdk-s3.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-cpp-sdk-core.so /usr/local/lib/libaws-crt-cpp.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-mqtt.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-event-stream.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-checksums.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-s3.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-auth.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-http.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-io.a /usr/local/lib/libs2n.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-compression.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-cal.a /usr/local/lib/libaws-c-common.a -lm -pthread -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl
